diagrams.title: SOC Metrics Data Flow
diagrams.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">SOC Metrics and KPIs</text>
  
  <!-- Main Categories -->
  <rect x="30" y="60" width="110" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="85" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Operational
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="30" y="120" width="110" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="85" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tactical
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="30" y="180" width="110" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="85" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Strategic
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Operational Metrics -->
  <rect x="160" y="50" width="110" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    MTTD
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="160" y="90" width="110" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    MTTR
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="160" y="130" width="110" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Alert Volume
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Tactical Metrics -->
  <rect x="160" y="170" width="110" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    False Positives
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="160" y="210" width="110" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="230" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Coverage
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Strategic Metrics -->
  <rect x="160" y="250" width="110" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ROI
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="160" y="290" width="110" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="310" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Risk Reduction
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connecting Lines -->
  <line x1="140" y1="80" x2="160" y2="65" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="140" y1="140" x2="160" y2="105" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="140" y1="140" x2="160" y2="145" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="140" y1="200" x2="160" y2="185" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="140" y1="200" x2="160" y2="225" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="140" y1="200" x2="160" y2="265" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="140" y1="200" x2="160" y2="305" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
